title: 5 Upcoming Dividend Increases To Start 2024, Including A Dividend King
text: ABM Industries extends its 56-year streak of dividend increases with a 2.3% increase.

title: 29 Undervalued Dividend Aristocrats: December 2023
text: The S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats Index contains 67 dividend growth stocks called the Dividend Aristocrats.

title: Franklin Resources: A Value Play With Catalysts
text: BEN is a cheap stock with a 4.2% dividend. The company has potential upside catalysts, including further integration of recent acquisitions, additional acquisition potential, share repurchases, and a growing alternatives business. Franklin Resources' strong position in the alternatives market is a key difference vs. traditional asset manager peers.

title: 5 Dividend Aristocrats Signal Buy In December, With 6 To Watch
text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years. "--Kiplinger.com/Investing. 66 Aristocrats, screened as of December 12, 2023, represented all eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker estimated-top-ten net-gains ranged 13.71%-31.37% topped-by XOM & CVX. By yield, WBA topped-all Aristocrats. Top-ten Yields from ABBV, ESS, CVX, FRT, BEN, TROW, AMCR, O, MMM, & WBA, averaged 5.13%.

title: Franklin (BEN) Hikes Dividends, Announces Share Buyback Plan
text: Franklin (BEN) announces a 3.3% increase in the quarterly dividend and enhances share repurchase scope by authorizing an additional 27.2 million shares.

title: S&P 500 Gains and Losses Today: Franklin Resources Gets a Boost From Higher AUM
text: U.S. equities rose, with the S&P 500 advancing 0.5% Tuesday after the latest report on consumer prices showed inflation cooling ahead of Wednesday's Fed rate decision.

title: Franklin Resources, Inc. Announces Quarterly Dividend and Addition to Stock Repurchase Program
text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Franklin Resources, Inc. (the “Company”) [NYSE:BEN] announced a quarterly cash dividend in the amount of $0.31 per share payable on January 12, 2024 to stockholders of record holding shares of common stock at the close of business on January 3, 2024. The quarterly dividend of $0.31 per share represents a 3.3% increase over the dividends paid for the prior quarter and the same quarter last year. The Company has raised its dividend every year since 1981. Furthe.

title: Franklin's (BEN) November AUM Rises 6% on Favorable Markets
text: Franklin's (BEN) November AUM balance increases on the back of favorable market performance and flat long-term net outflows.

title: Franklin Resources, Inc. Announces Month-End Assets Under Management
text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Franklin Resources, Inc. (Franklin Templeton) (NYSE: BEN) today reported preliminary month-end assets under management (AUM) of $1.41 trillion at November 30, 2023, compared to $1.33 trillion at October 31, 2023. This month's increase in AUM reflected the impact of positive markets and flat long-term net outflows. By Asset Class: (In USD billions) Preliminary                 30-Nov-23   31-Oct-23   30-Sep-23   30-Jun-23   30-Nov-22 Fixed Income $494.9 $468.9.
